hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ "${FILE##*.}" = "py" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *'/src/'* || "$FILE" == *'/tests/'* ]]; then uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" && uv run ruff format "$FILE"; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running Ruff on edited Python file

hooks.command: uv run ruff check src tests && uv run basedpyright
